_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v19 CSE build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05152026/v19_plan.txt. v19 carries v17.1 floors verbatim because v19_cse.txt is byte-identical to v17.1.txt (SHA256 9923f71f...). The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v19 stages 3 (TAA) and 4 (CSE) reproduce the v18.x chain bit-for-bit; only the Stage 5 (Recalibrate) interleave-probs change. Row-count gate is therefore unchanged.

axes._note: Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.TI.GRP.{1,2,3} + JS.CSE.TI.MAL.{1,2,3} declared sum: 1500*3 + 2500 + 1500*2 = 10000. Floor sized to ~50% of declared to give the per-actor cap (60) headroom. v17 actual under this plan: 5914.
Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.TI.CMP.1 declared 2500; JS.CSE.TI.NEG.1 declared 1500. v17 actual: 2242.
Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.MAL.RPT.{1,2,3} declared sum: 5500 against the ~830 malware anchor pool. v17 actual: 5039.
Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.MAL.TAC.1 declared 1500; JS.CSE.MAL.TGT.1 declared 1500; JS.CSE.MAL.NEG.1 declared 1000. v17 actual: 3753.
